metadata.title: Mai Tantance Meta Title & Description Kyauta – Faɗin Pixel
metadata.description: Tantance tsayin meta title da description a cikin haruffa da pixels. Duba SERP na Google yana taimaka maka guje wa ƙirƙirar da aka yanke. Ba buƙatar rajista.

hero.title: Tantance tsayin taken shafin ka da bayani a cikin Google
hero.description: Shigar da take da bayani, kayan aikin zai ƙididdige adadin haruffa, adadin kalmomi, faɗin pixel, kuma ya nuna ko tsayin ya bi mafi kyawun al'adun SEO

software.name: Mai tantance tsayin meta title da description kyauta ta yanar gizo
alternateName: Mai tantance meta title da description tare da duban Google
Duban ƙirƙirar Google ta yanar gizo
Tantance tsayin taken SEO a cikin pixels
Kayan aikin tantance tsayin alamar meta
Nawa haruffa a cikin meta description
Mafi kyawun tsayin take da bayani
Mai tantance alamar meta na SEO
software.description: Mai tantance tsayin meta title da description kyauta. Yana tantance adadin haruffa, adadin kalmomi, da faɗin pixel. Yana nuna duban yadda taken da bayanin ke bayyana a cikin sakamakon binciken Google.
featureList: Mai ƙididdige haruffa don meta title
Mai ƙididdige haruffa don meta description
Ma'aunin faɗin pixel (mai dacewa da Google)
Mai ƙididdige kalmomi don take da bayani
Kimantawa mai launi na tsayi (gajere sosai / mafi kyau / tsawo sosai)

Sarrafa a cikin browser na gida

howTo.name: Yadda ake tantance tsayin meta title da description
howTo.description: Tantance tsayin meta title da description a cikin pixels da haruffa. Koyi nawa haruffa taken (50–60) da bayanin (120–160) ya kamata su kasance da yadda ake guje wa yanke a cikin Google.

steps.name: Shigar da meta title
steps.text: Liƙa ko rubuta taken shafin ka a cikin filin Meta title. Kayan aikin zai ƙididdige adadin haruffa, adadin kalmomi, da faɗin pixel ta atomatik.

steps.name: Shigar da meta description
steps.text: Ƙara bayanin shafin a cikin filin Meta description. Za ka ga ma'aunai iri ɗaya. Filin ya fi girma saboda bayanai sun fi tsayi fiye da takunce - za ka iya sanya jimloli 2–3 masu gajarta.

steps.name: Tantance duban Google
steps.text: Duba yadda taken da bayanin ke bayyana a cikin kwaikwayon sakamakon binciken Google. Duban yana yanke rubutu ta atomatik kamar yadda injin bincike zai yi.

steps.name: Daidaita bisa shawarwari
steps.text: Idan matsayin yana nuna Gajere sosai ko Tsawo sosai, daidaita rubutun kuma duba canje-canje a lokaci guda.

contentBlocks.title: Menene meta title da meta description?
contentBlocks.html:
Meta title da meta description rubutun gajeru biyu ne da ke bayyana abin da ke cikin shafin yanar gizo. Ba a ganin su kai tsaye a kan shafin amma suna bayyana a cikin sakamakon binciken Google a matsayin taken (hanyar haɗi mai shuɗi) da bayani (rubutu mai toka ƙasan taken).

Alamomin meta da aka rubuta da kyau suna aiki kamar talla don shafin ka a cikin sakamakon bincike - suna jawo hankali kuma suna ƙara damar dannawa. Alamomin da aka rubuta ba da kyau ba ko waɗanda aka yanke na iya hana dannawa, ko da shafin kansa yana da daraja.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake amfani da mai tantance meta title da description
contentBlocks.description: Tantance tsayin alamar meta yana ɗaukar mintuna ɗaya kusan:

items.title: 1. Shigar da taken shafin
items.description: Liƙa ko rubuta meta title a cikin filin rubutu na farko. Kayan aikin zai nuna ma'aunai uku nan da nan: adadin haruffa, adadin kalmomi, da faɗin pixel. Matsayin mai launi zai bayyana kusa da su.

items.title: 2. Shigar da bayanin shafin
items.description: Ƙara meta description a cikin filin na biyu. Za ka ga ma'aunai iri ɗaya. Filin ya fi girma saboda bayanai sun fi tsayi fiye da takunce - za ka iya sanya jimloli 2–3 masu gajarta.

items.title: 3. Tantance duban
items.description: A gefen dama (tebur) ko ƙasa (waya) za ka ga duban da ke nuna yadda taken da bayanin ke bayyana a cikin sakamakon binciken Google. Ana yanke rubutu ta atomatik kamar yadda injin bincike zai yi.

items.title: 4. Daidaita bisa shawarwari
items.description: Idan matsayin yana nuna Gajere sosai ko Tsawo sosai, daidaita rubutun. Canje-canje suna bayyana nan da nan - za ka iya gwadawa har sai ka sami mafi kyawun tsayi da abun ciki.

contentBlocks.title: Nawa haruffa ya kamata meta title da description su kasance?
contentBlocks.html:
Google yana yanke takunce da bayanai da suka yi tsayi. A ƙasa akwai kewayon da ake ba da shawara waɗanda ke rage haɗarin yanke rubutu a cikin sakamakon bincike.

AbuHaruffaPixelsBayanan kula
Meta titleHaruffa 50–60har zuwa ~580 pxSanya muhimman kalmomi a farko. Sunan alama a ƙarshe.
Meta descriptionHaruffa 120–160har zuwa ~920 pxZa ka iya sanya jimloli 2–3 masu gajarta. Ƙare da kiran aiki.

Waɗannan ƙimomi ne na kusan - Google ba ya buga iyakoki masu tsauri kuma yana iya daidaita su dangane da na'ura da mahallin tambaya.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake fassara sakamakon
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Meta title

Haruffa: 52Kalmomi: 7Pixels: 456px
Kyakkyawan tsayi

Meta description

Haruffa: 142Kalmomi: 21Pixels: 812px
Kyakkyawan tsayi
contentBlocks.html:
Kayan aikin yana nuna ma'aunai uku don kowane fili tare da kimantawa mai launi na tsayi:

Ma'aunai

  • Haruffa - jimlar adadin haruffa (gami da sarari). Mai sauƙin fahimta amma ba shi da daidaito kamar pixels.
  • Kalmomi - adadin kalmomi. Yana da amfani don tantancewa cikin sauri na tsayi.
  • Faɗi (px) - faɗin rubutu a cikin pixels. Wannan shine ƙimar da Google ke amfani da ita a zahiri lokacin yanke.

Matsayin kimantawa

  • Kyakkyawan tsayi (kore) - rubutu yana cikin kewayon da ake ba da shawara. Google ya kamata ya nuna shi gaba ɗaya.
  • Gajere sosai (rawaya) - rubutu gajere ne sosai. Kana da sarari don ƙarin bayanai da za su iya ƙarfafa dannawa.
  • Tsawo sosai (ja) - rubutu ya wuce kewayon da ake ba da shawara. Wataƙila Google zai yanke shi. Yi la'akari da ragewa.
  • Babu bayanai (toka) - filin yana da fanko. Shigar da rubutu don ganin bincike.

Kewayon da ake ba da shawara

Meta title: haruffa 35–65 ko faɗin 350–580 pixels. Sanya muhimman kalmomi a farko.

Meta description: haruffa 100–165 ko faɗin 430–920 pixels. Za ka iya sanya jimloli 2–3 masu gajarta.

contentBlocks.title: Me ya sa faɗin pixel ya fi muhimmanci fiye da adadin haruffa
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
iiiiiiiiiiiiiiii (haruffa 16)

~64px faɗi

WWWWWWWWWWWWWWWW (haruffa 16)

~256px faɗi
contentBlocks.html:
Haruffa daban-daban suna da faɗi daban-daban. Kwatanta "iiii" da "WWWW" - duka biyun suna da haruffa 4, amma faɗin gani ya sha bamban gaba ɗaya. Google yana auna faɗin rubutu a cikin pixels, ba haruffa ba.

Wannan yana nufin taken da ke da haruffa masu ƙunci da yawa (i, l, t, f) na iya zama ya fi tsayi fiye da taken da ke da haruffa masu faɗi (W, M, O), duk da adadin haruffa iri ɗaya. Kayan aikin yana nuna ƙimomi biyu: adadin haruffa (mai sauƙin fahimta) da faɗin pixel (mafi daidaito don Google).

contentBlocks.title: Duban ƙirƙira - menene ke nunawa?
contentBlocks.html:
Duban ƙirƙira yana kwaikwayon yadda taken da bayanin shafin ka ke bayyana a cikin sakamakon binciken Google. Kwaikwayo ne na kusan - bayyanar gaske na iya bambanta kaɗan dangane da na'ura da browser.

Abubuwan duban

  • URL - adireshin shafin da ake nuna sama da taken. Za ka iya shigar da shi a cikin filin na zaɓi don sa duban ya fi gaskiya.
  • Take - kan taken mai shuɗi. Idan ya yi tsayi, kayan aikin yana yanke shi ta atomatik kuma yana ƙara alamar digo.
  • Bayani - rubutu mai toka ƙasan taken. Ana yanke shi ma idan ya wuce iyaka.

Abin da duban ba ya nunawa

Duban ba ya ƙunshe da dukan abubuwan da Google na iya ƙarawa zuwa sakamako: kwanakin, ƙimar taurari, hanyoyin haɗi na shafi, ko ƙirƙirar bayanan da suka wadata. Sigar da aka sauƙaƙe ce da ke mayar da hankali kan tsayin rubutu.

contentBlocks.title: Matsaloli na yau da kullum da mafita

items.title: Taken ya yi tsayi
items.description: Rage taken yayin kiyaye muhimman kalmomi a farko. Cire siffofi kamar "mafi kyau" ko "na ƙwararru" - ba kasafai suke ƙara daraja ba. Sanya sunan alama a ƙarshe bayan mai raba.

items.title: Bayani ya yi gajarta
items.description: Ƙara ƙarin bayanai: menene mai amfani zai samu a kan shafin, wane fa'ida za su samu, menene ke bambanta tayin. Ƙare da kiran aiki.

items.title: Faɗin pixel ya sha bamban da abin da ake tsammani
items.description: Kayan aikin yana auna faɗi ta amfani da font na al'ada mai kama da wanda Google ke amfani da shi. Sakamakon na iya bambanta kaɗan dangane da browser.

contentBlocks.title: Wa ne mai tantance alamar meta ke yi wa?
contentBlocks.description: Mai tantance alamar meta yana da amfani ga duk wanda ke ƙirƙirar abun ciki na yanar gizo:

items.title: Masu gidan yanar gizo da shago
items.description: Tantance ko ana yanke takunce da bayanai a cikin sakamakon Google kafin buga sabon shafi ko kayan.

items.title: Ƙwararrun SEO
items.description: Gwada bambance-bambancen take da bayani daban-daban, duba duban sakamakon bincike, kuma tabbatar da bin ka'idoji.

items.title: Marubutan kwafi
items.description: Rubuta takunce da bayanai da suka dace a cikin iyaka kuma suna ƙarfafa dannawa.

items.title: Masu talla
items.description: Ƙirƙiri alamomin meta don yaƙin neman kuɗi da shafukan saukowa, inganta yawan dannawa a cikin sakamakon na asali.

items.title: Masu haɓaka
items.description: Tabbatar da alamomin meta kafin tura shafin zuwa samarwa.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ke sa mai tantance meta title da description ya bambanta?

items.title: Ma'aunin pixel
items.description: Ba kawai muna ƙididdige haruffa ba - muna auna faɗin rubutu na gaske yadda Google ke yi.

items.title: Duban Google
items.description: Duba yadda taken da bayanin ke bayyana a cikin sakamakon bincike kafin buga shafin ka.

items.title: Kimantawa mai launi
items.description: Ka sani nan da nan ko rubutun ya yi gajarta, mafi kyau, ko tsawo sosai.

items.title: Pixel da adadin haruffa tare
items.description: Kayan aikin yana nuna ƙimomi biyu a lokaci guda - za ka iya kwatanta ko taken ya dace a cikin iyakar haruffa da pixel duka.

items.title: Take da bayani a cikin duba guda ɗaya
items.description: Tantance meta title da description a lokaci guda, ba tare da canjawa tsakanin shafuka ba.

contentBlocks.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da mai tantance meta title da description

items.question: Me ya sa kayan aikin ke nuna faɗin pixel maimakon adadin haruffa kawai?
items.answer: Haruffa daban-daban suna da faɗi daban-daban. Harafin "i" yana ɗaukar sarari kaɗan fiye da "m" ko "W". Google yana yanke takunce da bayanai dangane da faɗin pixel, ba adadin haruffa ba. Wannan yana nufin rubutu mai haruffa masu ƙunci da yawa na iya zama ya fi tsayi fiye da rubutu mai haruffa masu faɗi, ko da adadin haruffa iri ɗaya ne.
items.answerSchemaText: Google yana yanke dangane da faɗin pixel, ba adadin haruffa ba. Haruffa daban-daban suna da faɗi daban-daban.

items.question: Shin Google koyaushe yana nuna meta title da description na?
items.answer: Ba koyaushe ba. Google na iya canza taken ko bayanin da ake nuna idan ya yi la'akari da wani abu a matsayin mafi dacewa don tambayar mai amfani. Yawanci yana ciro ƙirƙira daga abun cikin shafin. Alamomin meta da aka rubuta da kyau suna ƙara damar Google ya yi amfani da su, amma babu garantin 100%.
items.answerSchemaText: Ba koyaushe ba. Google na iya canza taken ko bayanin da ake nuna don dacewa da tambayar da kyau.

items.question: Menene mafi kyawun tsayi don meta title da meta description?
items.answer: Meta title ya kamata ya kasance kusan haruffa 50–60 (har zuwa ~580 pixels faɗi). Meta description ya fi aiki a haruffa 120–160 (har zuwa ~920 pixels). Waɗannan ƙimomi ne na kusan - Google ba ya buga iyakoki masu tsauri kuma yana iya daidaita su.
items.answerSchemaText: Meta title: haruffa 50–60 (~580px). Meta description: haruffa 120–160 (~920px). Waɗannan ƙimomi ne na kusan.

items.question: Shin meta description yana shafar matsayin shafi a cikin Google?
items.answer: Meta description ba abin tantancewa ne na matsayi kai tsaye ba - Google ba ya amfani da shi don tantance matsayin shafi. Duk da haka, kyakkyawan bayani yana ƙara yawan dannawa daga sakamakon bincike, kuma babban CTR na iya shafar matsayi a kaikaice.
items.answerSchemaText: Meta description ba abin tantancewa ne na matsayi kai tsaye ba, amma kyakkyawan bayani na iya ƙara CTR kuma ya shafi matsayi a kaikaice.

items.question: Menene ya kamata in yi idan taken na ya yi tsayi?
items.answer: Rage taken yayin kiyaye muhimman kalmomi a farko. Cire kalmomin cikawa (misali, "mafi kyau", "na ƙwararru") kuma mayar da hankali kan takamaiman daraja ga mai amfani. Idan ka haɗa sunan alama, sanya shi a ƙarshe bayan mai raba.
items.answerSchemaText: Rage taken, kiyaye muhimman kalmomi a farko, kuma matsar da sunan alama zuwa ƙarshe.
